states.name: valid_first_useful_action
show_status_contains: First useful action: Add equality-boundary discriminator test
must_not: run ripr first-action from the editor

states.name: wrong_root_report
must_not: treat another workspace root as current

states.name: stale_saved_workspace
show_status_contains: First useful action report: available, but editor evidence is stale.
Save or refresh the Rust workspace before acting on this report.
must_not: hide stale evidence behind first-action status
